task_description: Sprint 8 Polish & Scale - Final sprint to make ChronAI launch-ready. Includes: Analytics dashboard, mobile responsiveness, page transitions, performance optimization, UI polish, accessibility, SEO, and bug sweep.

verification.summary: npm run build compiles successfully with all 12 routes. npm run lint shows zero warnings or errors. All pages render as static with proper code splitting. Analytics page at 5.19 kB, dashboard at 7.71 kB (reduced from 14.4 kB due to lazy loading).
